title: Ensure that Webshell detection is enabled on all web servers

input_row.title: Ensure that Webshell detection is enabled on all web servers
input_row.description: Enable webshell detection on all web servers to scans periodically the Web directories for detecting webshells on servers.
input_row.rationale: Web servers are exposed to the Internet and they are commonly attacked through injected webshell by attackers.
input_row.audit: Using the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click General. 4. Click Manage in Webshell Detection. 5. Ensure all web servers are included.
input_row.remediation: Using the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click General. 4. Click Manage in Webshell Detection. 5. Add all web servers.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. **Login to Alibaba Cloud Console:**
   - Navigate to the Security Center Console.

2. **Locate Webshell Detection Settings:**
   - In the Security Center, select "Settings".
   - Click on "General".

3. **Access Webshell Detection Management:**
   - Click on "Manage" under the Webshell Detection section.

4. **Verify Webserver Inclusion:**
   - Review the list of web servers that have webshell detection enabled.
   - Ensure all relevant web servers are included in the detection settings.

5. **Expected Secure Configuration:**
   - All public-facing web servers should be listed and have webshell detection enabled.

6. **Confirm Compliance:**
   - If any web server is not listed or webshell detection is not enabled, the control is not compliant. Document any non-compliance found for remediation.
